input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4.1.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4.1.8
            TITLE: yellow flag (stationary) - danger, slow down, be prepared to take evasive action,

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4.1.8: Yellow Flag (Stationary) - Danger, SLOW DOWN, be prepared to take evasive action,
D.4.1.8 Yellow Flag (Stationary) - Danger, SLOW DOWN, be prepared to take evasive action, 
something has happened beyond the flag station.  NO PASSING unless directed by the corner 
workers.

final_answer: rule D.4.1.8: Yellow Flag (Stationary) - Danger, SLOW DOWN, be prepared to take evasive action, something has happened beyond the flag station. NO PASSING unless directed by the corner workers.
